name: REX AMERICAN RESOURCES Corp
summary: REX American Resources Corporation is a Delaware holding company invested in three ethanol production entities: One Earth Energy, LLC (76.1% owned), NuGen Energy, LLC (99.7% owned), and Big River Resources, LLC (minority interest). The six facilities collectively shipped approximately 722 million gallons of ethanol in the twelve months ended January 31, 2026. REX produces ethanol via dry milling of corn, with co-products including distillers grains (DDGS) and distillers corn oil sold to animal feed, biodiesel, and chemical markets.
